content:
#!/bin/bash
echo "--- which python ---"
which python
echo "--- python --version ---"
python --version
echo "--- env ---"
env | grep -i python
echo "--- conda ---"
conda env list 2>/dev/null || echo "no conda"
echo "--- lerobot locations ---"
find /usr /opt -name "lerobot" -type d -maxdepth 6 2>/dev/null
echo "--- h5py locations ---"
find /usr /opt -name "h5py" -type d -maxdepth 6 2>/dev/null
echo "--- VLABench locations ---"
find /usr /opt -name "VLABench" -type d -maxdepth 6 2>/dev/null
